title: Zira Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Zira, with a Z-Score of +6.06. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level.
body:
The current heat wave in Zira has resulted in a score of 10.0/10, indicating a highly anomalous event. 
 The temperature has led to a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 20.2 GG, while the humidity is at 24% and wind speed is 7.6 km/h. 
 These conditions are expected to continue, with no Heating Degree Days (HDD) recorded, highlighting the intense heat.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave in Zira.
